title: Find and replace
excerpt: Could we please get a Find and Replace text function? :slight_smile:

posts.author: baylorpeak (Baylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Could we please get a Find and Replace text function?

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: If you want to bring in HR and Finance more, you will need a find and replace functionality. Advising to export to excel and then change and import in is not going to fly with this efficiency experienced used.
